allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } catch {} }; "ok")

hooks.command: echo "Reminder for this turn: (1) Before starting any work, restate/rewrite the user's request in your own words and show it back to them. (2) If you make any file edits this turn, end your message with a 'Commit message:' recap - a concise one-line git commit subject (plus short body bullets if useful)."
